raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "82% of the increase in gasoline prices since 2019 is attributable to the cost of producing fuel.",
    "California's climate mandates will increase gas costs as a way to push people into electric vehicles.",
    "Clean fuels will increase as California's regulatory program becomes more stringent.",
    "There is a tradeoff between climate programs and gas costs in California's move towards a zero-carbon economy.",
    "Renewable diesel and ethanol currently provide lower-cost alternatives to petroleum diesel and gasoline."
  ]
}
```
